Now here is the script that we use associated with that.
So the script that we use to sell this free CD, this free DVD, this free book is what I call the Who What Why How script.
I originally learned this concept from John Carlton.
I'll give him credit for it.
But this is what the Who What Why How script looks like.
You're basically going to answer four questions for someone when they come to your website.
Somebody comes to the website and for example for my .com Secrets Labs book they come to the page and I can answer these four things.
The first one is Who.
So I say, Hey, my name is Russell Brunson.
Okay, I just told them who.
Second one is What.
I've got a free book here that's going to show you 108 of my top split test results.
I'll show them what they've got, right?
Then I tell them why they need it.
The reason why you need this book is if you've got a website and you're struggling to get it to convert and to turn your traffic into visitors, just because you set it up wrong when you structured it the wrong way, this book is going to show you every single split test we ran the last two years, what worked, what didn't work and then you can just look at it and copy it for your own business and see huge success.
That's why you need it.
Then how can you get it?
How you can get it?
Just fill out the form on the side.
Let me know where to ship this to and then click submit and then we'll send you this book in the mail right away.
Okay, pretty simple, right?
Who What Why How?
Who Are You?
My name is Russell Brunson.
I've got this free book.
It's going to help you a ton.
You need this because it's going to help you.
How can you get it?
Click on the button to get it.
Okay, that's my Who What Why house script.
Now if you want to amplify that, there's a couple of other things we do, especially on the free plus shipping things that work really good is these last four down here.
They're not necessary, but they will help.
Usually I say, now a lot of you guys are wondering what's the catch for me giving away this free CD?
Well, there is no catch.
I just want to get one of my products in your hands so in the future you want to buy more cool stuff for me.
All right, so I kind of share a catch.
Then I have urgency.
So hey, I only printed X amount of copies of this book.
When they're gone, I got to reorder so they'll be off the shelves for probably a week or two.
Maybe now you need to get it today.
How's my urgency?
Guarantee.
If you don't like this book for whatever reason, ship it back to me.
I won't charge you a penny and then recap the offer.
So once again, you're going to get this book for free.
I'll ship it out to you.
You're going to love it.
Blah, blah, blah, blah.
I'll recap the offer.
Okay, so there is the Who What Why house script.
Let's see what you guys are probably thinking.
Russell, how do I use that?
Is it a video?
Is it a sales letter?
Is it what is it?
The answer is yes.
It just depends on how you want to do it.
Okay, those of you guys who are good on video, do a video.
Those of you guys who are horrible on video, do a sales letter.
This is the message that will be on this landing page when somebody comes to get your free plus shipping thing.
Who What Why How?
We use this Who What Why How script in a lot of other funnels as well.
We use it to get people to register for webinars.
We use it a lot of times for trial offers and continuity, things like that.
But it's a very simple, easy script that most of you guys can master in about five minutes.
So anytime you're trying to sell something that's low barrier, you're not just selling that hard.
It's just kind of getting somebody to say a yes to Who What Why How script works awesome.
